pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a newer snapshot version compatible with Java 21.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner type casting.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after:
if(endpointCredential instanceof  AccountEndpointCredential credential){
            return credential;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner type casting.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after:
if(endpointCredential instanceof OAuthEndpointCredential credential){
            return credential;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace manual index-based list access with the Java 21 List.getLast() convenience method.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: List.get(0) is not a compile error, but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API; however, since get(0) still compiles and runs on Java 21, this is technically a polishment unless the recipe enforces removal of deprecated patterns. Given the rule 'Default to polishment when in doubt' and that get(0) is not removed in JDK 21 (only getFirst added), this is polishment.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for specific java.nio.file classes.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
